series_metadata.series_description: Memoranda (O.R.C. 5747.025(B)) identifying the adjustment to the personal exemptions (O.R.C. 5747.025(A)) and any spreadsheet, data, and/or calculations identifying the adjustment.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
